title: Trump Lashes Out at NATO After Allies Decline Hormuz Support
detail: Trump posted on Truth Social that NATO allies are 'COWARDS, and we will REMEMBER!' after European nations declined to commit forces to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Pentagon chief Pete Hegseth publicly described European allies as 'ungrateful.' Trump said 'We don't need any help' from NATO, while simultaneously expressing fury that allies refused. He invoked US support for Ukraine, saying 'We help them, and they didn't help us, and I think that's a very bad thing for NATO.' The Washington Post reported Trump 'fumes at NATO' and 'embraces going it alone.'

media.caption: Trump lashes out at NATO after allies decline Hormuz support

title: Germany Flatly Rejects Trump's Strait of Hormuz Request
detail: German Defense Minister Boris Pistorius dismissed Trump's request for NATO military assistance in the Strait of Hormuz, asking: 'What does Trump expect a handful or two handfuls of European frigates to do in the Strait of Hormuz that the powerful US Navy cannot do?' Pistorius added 'This is not our war; we have not started it.' A spokesman for German Chancellor Friedrich Merz echoed: 'This war has nothing to do with NATO. It is not NATO's war.' European allies told Trump 'nein,' 'non,' and 'no' on helping force open the Hormuz Strait.

media.caption: Germany flatly rejects Trump's Strait of Hormuz request
